title: Billing multi-currency support: per-customer locale, multi-currency plan prices, FX fallback, addon currency match
discoveredDuring: SPEC-143 T-143-62 reframe — multi-currency price selection is aspirational. billing_customers has no currency/locale, billing_plans has single-currency price columns, checkout never branches on customer currency, exchange_rates table exists but is decorative wrt checkout, addon currency mismatch is not validated.
